paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently at 6.05, with a 2.02 percent increase from the prior close, and a 36.32 percent decrease over the last 20 trading sessions. The price quote is as of July 17, 2026.

There is one new news item in the last 24 hours, with a recent headline from Stocktwits discussing the company's lack of revenue and significant loss, as well as its expected signing of binding agreements with tenants over the next year. This news item was published on July 18, 2026.

Fermi Inc. has filed several recent SEC filings, including three 8-K forms and two other forms, with a total of 25 filings in the feed and one Form 4 filing. The recent 8-K forms include announcements of the issuance of convertible senior notes, the resignation of a director, and the commencement of an offering for the sale of convertible senior notes.
